name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: Watch John on the View tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
As we come up on the second debate in Detroit, John's taking every opportunity possible to demonstrate his experience and vision to the American people. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771758/691c9bd/6d10da6f/11a4768d/4145028697/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| **Team, a quick heads up --John will be on _The View_ tomorrow at 11 AM EST. Be sure to tune in.**

As we come up on the second debate in Detroit, John's taking every opportunity possible to demonstrate his experience and share his vision with the American people. The fact is, he's done something _no_ other candidate has: run a small business, a city, _and_ a state. And he has something no other candidate has: a track record of proven, progressive results that Washington politicians are just talking about.

[**_Tune in to watch John on _The View_ tomorrow, and chip in $5 now to help us continue to grow this campaign._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190718_TH_20190718-fr-TH-view-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771758/691c9bd/6d10da6f/11a47689/4145028697/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771758/691c9bd/6d10da6f/11a47686/4145028697/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771758/691c9bd/6d10da6f/11a47687/4145028697/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771758/691c9bd/6d10da6f/11a47684/4145028697/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Help win hand-marked paper ballots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
In 2017, individual Georgia voters and organizations dedicated to fighting for secure elections filed a lawsuit against former Secretary of State Brian Kemp that challenges the state's use of hackable |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6d7/34a064cc/19535a35/703da8f/237980537/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - In 2017, individual Georgia voters and organizations dedicated to fighting for secure elections filed a lawsuit against former Secretary of State Brian Kemp that challenges the state's use of hackable voting machines and demands the state move to hand-marked paper ballots. This federal lawsuit, _Curling v. Raffensperger_ , is unique and historic in how far the case has made it in the courts in the push for paper ballots. The preliminary injunction hearing is set for one week from today: Thursday, July 25th . **Georgia voters and the rest of the nation deserve fair, free, and secure elections. But they need your help. **[**Join Fair Fight in supporting our allies in their fight for hand-marked paper ballots.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6d7/34a064cc/19535a35/703da8c/237980537/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/handmarkedballots?refcode=IE071819HPB") Over the next week leading up to their first hearing, Fair Fight will be accepting donations to support this important legal work, and Fair Fight will match the amount collected up to $50,000, and equally split the proceeds between the organizations working to secure hand-marked paper ballots for Georgia voters. Together, we can win this fight. Now let's get it done. Onward,
Team Fair Fight
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6d7/34a064cc/19535a35/703da8c/237980537/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/handmarkedballots?refcode=IE071819HPB")**
---

|

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Facing off against Joe Biden, Cory Booker, and more on July 31
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
**_CNN_ just announced that I'll be facing off against Joe Biden, Cory Booker, and more in the next presidential debate on July 31.** This upcoming debate is another opportunity to share our ideas for the future of our country and to reach more Americans to join our movement to prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump and this administration. But wait, there's more: You have a chance to join me at the Democratic presidential primary on July 31 as a guest of our campaign -- airfare and hotel included! name: Team Hood
subject: Tell Jim what matters to you >>
body:
|
---
After eight years of failed leadership by Tate Reeves, Mississippi has been left with crumbling roads and bridges, a teacher shortage, and rural hospital closures all over the state.

**HOOD FOR MISSISSIPPI
ISSUES SURVEY**

Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Length: 6 Questions
Time to Complete: 3 Minutes
| ********[**BEGIN SURVEY**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oVBn8JF74v2UWRPY5uUGiYm8nQ-hK01KX-gkFByCPxM=/ue9LZteGSfpk3IpaDKfhsX1WQl03Fv04o_fdM8J02-k=)********
---
Friend,

After **eight years of failed leadership by Tate Reeves** , Mississippi has been left with crumbling roads and bridges, a teacher shortage, and rural hospital closures all over the state. Jim knows it's time to work together and build a better Mississippi for everyone -- and that's what he'll do as governor!

Jim will work to get people swinging hammers and building bridges, invest in our public education system, and make health care affordable and accessible. And maybe most importantly, **he 'll work to make state government honest and transparent** so that it truly works for Mississippians, and not special interests.

But before Jim can do any of that, he has to win this election in November -- and he's counting on your support to do it. **That 's why it's so important to Jim that he hear from you about the issues that are at the top of your mind.

[Will you take a minute to fill out Jim's Issues Survey and let him know what's most important to you in the upcoming election? If he's going to put our families first as governor, he needs to know what you think.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oVBn8JF74v2UWRPY5uUGiYm8nQ-hK01KX-gkFByCPxM=/ue9LZteGSfpk3IpaDKfhsX1WQl03Fv04o_fdM8J02-k=)**

********[**BEGIN SURVEY**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oVBn8JF74v2UWRPY5uUGiYm8nQ-hK01KX-gkFByCPxM=/ue9LZteGSfpk3IpaDKfhsX1WQl03Fv04o_fdM8J02-k=)********
---
Thank you,
Team Hood

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oVBn8JF74v2UWRPY5uUGiYm8nQ-hK01KX-gkFByCPxM=/FhrJNWEkgLkL3zbG3RyOp7Ebi_rfj9zrBCJQFBOncS0=?refcode=20190719ndbutton&amount=10)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Children belong with their families
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter - Last week, I had the opportunity to visit the southern border amidst the ongoing humanitarian crisis. The reports of the horrific conditions that child migrants are being kept in are unfortunately correct.

It is simply unacceptable that the Trump administration has made migrants go without a shower or a place to sleep for days at a time. This inhumane treatment cannot stand.

[Let's send a clear message to the administration. Sign on to demand Trump end family separation and close the centers.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9EHIWYkHd2pHQ4GkEueKpZcntFF9lhV4_02rx8Doryg=/3Yt3LTz26F7STCUBqReSqCavNMoCXYtGWcI1lvx6Z60=)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/9EHIWYkHd2pHQ4GkEueKpZcntFF9lhV4_02rx8Doryg=/3Yt3LTz26F7STCUBqReSqCavNMoCXYtGWcI1lvx6Z60=)
---
Children in these detention centers have endured neglect, unsanitary conditions, and the denial of necessities like soap, toothbrushes, and towels according to an Inspector General report.

This treatment is inhumane and draconian, and it must end. I will keep fighting in Congress to end this unacceptable treatment, and to ensure that migrants coming to our country in search of a better life are treated with the dignity they deserve.

[It's time to close the centers and put an end to family separation and the inhumane treatment of children. Add your name if you agree.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9EHIWYkHd2pHQ4GkEueKpZcntFF9lhV4_02rx8Doryg=/3Yt3LTz26F7STCUBqReSqCavNMoCXYtGWcI1lvx6Z60=)

Thanks for taking action,

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9EHIWYkHd2pHQ4GkEueKpZcntFF9lhV4_02rx8Doryg=/3Yt3LTz26F7STCUBqReSqCavNMoCXYtGWcI1lvx6Z60=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. clean_body: Peter - Last week, I had the opportunity to visit the southern border amidst the ongoing humanitarian crisis. The reports of the horrific conditions that child migrants are being kept in are unfortunately correct. It is simply unacceptable that the Trump administration has made migrants go without a shower or a place to sleep for days at a time. This inhumane treatment cannot stand. = | = Children in these detention centers have endured neglect, unsanitary conditions, and the denial of necessities like soap, toothbrushes, and towels according to an Inspector General report. This treatment is inhumane and draconian, and it must end. I will keep fighting in Congress to end this unacceptable treatment, and to ensure that migrants coming to our country in search of a better life are treated with the dignity they deserve. = Thanks for taking action, Mike = * Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. tell Congress to protect our health care!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dda5/693b8b0a/477e02e4/72de82f0/2891949739/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/aca-lawsuit/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-aca-lawsuit-ups%3Frefcode%3Dups%26amount%3D27%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

name: Jason Yates
subject: The Family is under attack: 3 things we must do
body:
| | Peter, There’s a fierce battle raging for the soul of America. Have you seen it? It is a war waged against the institution of the family and the most foundational truth holding it all together - God’s definition of male and female. My Faith Votes Honorary National Chairman Mike Huckabee recently said it this way: “**I believe the biggest threat to the moral fiber of the U.S. is the illusion that there is no gender.** ” If Christians hope to preserve what God designed and established, then we must stand against these assaults with the truth of God’s principles. We see gender under attack at the state level and the federal level. In twenty-four states, gender identity laws have passed affecting religious freedom in the areas of business, education, counseling, and so many more. And an estimated 400 cities across the nation have passed sexual orientation and gender identity policies that stifle religious freedom. **We must remember[three things](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNddW5obX66c2tAZ9eqt8Fq9EyGZyvkuUqZlT2U0es17MlglsYZMVZBrm0_NBF7kZs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190719com01&n=1) as we stand united and respond to the attacks on the institution of the family.** If we act with these powerful steps in mind, we can influence the culture for Biblical values. Read the rest of my thoughts on the subject in my article, **_[The Foundation of a Strong Society](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNddW5obX66c2tAZ9eqt8Fq9EyGZyvkuUqZlT2U0es17MlglsYZMVZBrm0_NBF7kZs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190719com01&n=2)_**. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNddW5obX66c2tAZ9eqt8Fq9EyGZyvkuUqZlT2U0es17MlglsYZMVZBrm0_NBF7kZs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190719com01&n=3) Thank you for being an advocate for Godly principles in the public square. It’s an honor to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with you. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190719com01&n=4)
---

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Hey Perdue, still think it’s “outrageous” to call this racist?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
The author Toni Morrison once said, “The function, the very serious function of racism is distraction. It keeps you from doing your work.”
Well, friend, we are being distracted with the racist shenanigans of President Trump and David Perdue.
People around the country are going to look at how we respond to these attacks here in Georgia. That’s why we need you to add your name to rebuke these racist distractions and tell the Senate to bring the House’s Raise the Wage Act — guaranteeing a $15 federal minimum wage — to a vote. [https://teresatomlinson.com/reject-racism-fight-for-justice/?emci=6dfa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=6efa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=UCwH85zjIfNSbrlCa7CpqLYHGcO5hrY9tKf5mEMMn5CF015WJj%2FXOVUVx5%2BIoS35zn%2BcT3%2FT1GGtwACYgNtXBcgUSA9%2FKr6hE71wzOp9qiI%3D&refcode=em071919b&refcode2=6efa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb]
On Monday, after Trump’s weekend Twitter tirade where he told four congresswomen of color to go back to where they came from, David Perdue deemed it “outrageous” to consider these tweets racist.
On Wednesday, the President singled out one of these women at a rally in North Carolina and stood silently while a crowd proceeded to chant “send her back.”
Yesterday — one day after the North Carolina rally — the House passed a bill that would raise the minimum wage to $15 per hour. It now goes to the Senate, where David Perdue and the Republicans will let it die. The distraction of racism perpetrated by Trump — and abetted by Perdue and other Republicans — has created a vacuum where coverage of Senate Republicans’ inaction on the minimum wage has skated under the radar.
We cannot afford to waste six more years with David Perdue’s distractions: blocking legislation to raise the minimum wage, failing to enact comprehensive immigration reform, or falling behind on the many other issues actively being made worse by Republican policies.
It’s time Georgia has new leadership representing us. Add your name to help rebuke these distractions and put the Senate to work for you. [https://teresatomlinson.com/reject-racism-fight-for-justice/?emci=6dfa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=6efa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=UCwH85zjIfNSbrlCa7CpqLYHGcO5hrY9tKf5mEMMn5CF015WJj%2FXOVUVx5%2BIoS35zn%2BcT3%2FT1GGtwACYgNtXBcgUSA9%2FKr6hE71wzOp9qiI%3D&refcode=em071919b&refcode2=6efa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb]
We will not sit idly by while this racist administration attacks our people. Thank you for having the courage to do what David Perdue does not — speak up.
– Team Tomlinson
ADD YOUR NAME [https://teresatomlinson.com/reject-racism-fight-for-justice/?emci=6dfa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=6efa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=UCwH85zjIfNSbrlCa7CpqLYHGcO5hrY9tKf5mEMMn5CF015WJj%2FXOVUVx5%2BIoS35zn%2BcT3%2FT1GGtwACYgNtXBcgUSA9%2FKr6hE71wzOp9qiI%3D&refcode=em071919b&refcode2=6efa1410-4eaa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb]

name: Kamala Organizing HQ
subject: We’ll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Last night, we got some big news: for the second round of debates, Kamala will face off against Joe Biden, Cory Booker, and more on Wednesday, July 31. We’ll get right to it: we’re building a robust network of volunteer-hosted watch parties across the country to cheer for Kamala during the next debate. Can you host one of them? **[Sign up to host a debate watch party for Kamala today. Our team will make sure you’re set up with all the information you need to host a great event!](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/july-debate-watch-host/?refcode=ema190719-full&source=ema190719-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=5616%2E5755789%2E2KTxG7)** | | [COMMIT TO HOST](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/july-debate-watch-host/?refcode=ema190719-full&source=ema190719-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=5616%2E5755789%2E2KTxG7)
---
These debates are great opportunities for Kamala to make the case for our campaign to millions of undecided voters across America.
During the last debate in June, Kamala broke through the noise -- proving that she’s the best candidate in this crowded primary to prosecute the case against four more years of the Trump Administration.
The energy we’ve felt ever since the June debate has been electric. That’s due in large part to supporters like you stepping up across the country to host watch parties in your community to cheer for Kamala.
**It’s easy to be a host! Not to mention ... it’s pretty fun. Check out these pics from some of our June debate watch parties across the country:**
**[You can host your own watch party for Kamala during the next debate on July 31 -- it’s easy! Commit to hosting a watch party in your area today:](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/july-debate-watch-host/?refcode=ema190719-full&source=ema190719-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=5616%2E5755789%2E2KTxG7)**
| [COMMIT TO HOST](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/july-debate-watch-host/?refcode=ema190719-full&source=ema190719-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=4&akid=5616%2E5755789%2E2KTxG7)
---
Once you sign up to host, our team will be in touch to make sure you’ve got everything you need to host a successful event.
Looking forward to it!
— Team Kamala

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list. You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=5&akid=5616%2E5755789%2E2KTxG7), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5616%2E5755789%2E2KTxG7)

Abigail

Hi Peter

As Abigail is holding town halls across every county in the 7th district and working hard on Capitol Hill, our campaign team is planning for 2020 each and every day. We're outlining our outreach strategy, detailing our communications plan, and finalizing our campaign budget for next year.

We have an ambitious fundraising goal for this race because we have an ambitious and fulsome communications and outreach plan. National Republican Super PACs have already made it clear they want to replace Abigail, and we won't let that happen.

As we plan diligently, [_**would you help us by becoming a sustaining donor to our campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/W0rhhs4Y_scPA8ZWR4XMUbPOXXMJcQO7H21p4QSxS4w=/xy__TwRkmNbt8hla6Tx3LJHc6Ai14WBdRUvvSF-CKDA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190719-1-EM&recurring=TRUE&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

Forecasting our budget can be tricky when our campaign relies on grassroots donations, so I'm asking if you would consider making a recurring donation each month? It could be $10 per month or $100 per month, it depends on you. But here is how it helps the campaign win:
* It gives us a reliable and predictable amount each month.
* It sends a signal to our opponents about the financial strength of our campaign.
* It gives us greater flexibility in planning and the ability to plan further ahead.

Thank you for considering our request! | | | | | | Thank you, Abigail \---------------Begin Forwarded Message-------------- Hi Peter As Abigail is holding town halls across every county in the 7th district and working hard on Capitol Hill, our campaign team is planning for 2020 each and every day. We're outlining our outreach strategy, detailing our communications plan, and finalizing our campaign budget for next year. We have an ambitious fundraising goal for this race because we have an ambitious and fulsome communications and outreach plan. National Republican Super PACs have already made it clear they want to replace Abigail, and we won't let that happen. As we plan diligently, Forecasting our budget can be tricky when our campaign relies on grassroots donations, so I'm asking if you would consider making a recurring donation each month? It could be $10 per month or $100 per month, it depends on you. But here is how it helps the campaign win: It gives us a reliable and predictable amount each month. It sends a signal to our opponents about the financial strength of our campaign. It gives us greater flexibility in planning and the ability to plan further ahead. | | | | | | If you're already a sustaining donor who contributes monthly, thank you! Would you consider forwarding this email on to a friend who might also want to support Abigail? Thanks again, \- Whitney Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: update@protectvoting.org
subject: We have to stand up for Rep. Omar Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Donald Trump's racist, vicious attacks on Ilhan Omar are HORRIFYING. Let's set the record straight: Ilhan Omar is a citizen of the United States and a sitting Congresswoman. Trump wants to "send her back" to a place that isn't even her home because she's a Muslim woman of color.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Donald Trump's racist, vicious attacks against Ilhan Omar are HORRIFYING: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0715/72412298/436ae5cc/6102137c/1972367093/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-rep-omar?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1") Let's set the record straight: Ilhan Omar is a citizen of the United States and a sitting Congresswoman. _**Trump wants to "send her back" to a place that isn't even her home because she's a Muslim woman of color.**_ [**Peter -- Donald Trump is disgracing the office of the presidency. Sign our petition to stand with Ilhan Omar against racism and hate >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0715/72412298/436ae5cc/6102137f/1972367093/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-rep-omar?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+FirstnameItrsquos+clear++Donald+Trump+is&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1") | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0715/72412298/436ae5cc/6102137e/1972367093/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-rep-omar?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1")

[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0715/72412298/436ae5cc/61021361/1972367093/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-rep-omar?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190721_StandwithOmar_U1_X1")
No President in recent memory has targeted a member of Congress as viciously as Donald Trump has targeted Rep. Omar and other women of color in the House.
His incitements look less like any other president's speech -- and more like a Klan rally.

name: Our Revolution (Important)
subject: authoritarianism is on the rise in the United States
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
it's because of you

As we saw at Donald Trump's hate rally, authoritarianism is here in the United States. The big donors and corporations who control our political system will not save us. The only way to stop our country from falling further down the rabbit hole of racism and depravity is to organize.

That's why the political revolution that Bernie has championed is so essential -- and why we need to step up right now.

Our movement is a threat to the establishment. Unlike the candidates performing uninspired cover versions of Bernie's 2016 campaign platform, we are doing the actual grassroots organizing work to advance a progressive agenda and transform our country.

[**_Pitch in $27 or whatever you can afford to help on-the-ground activists all over the country fight the rising tide of hatred, while continuing to advance our political revolution._**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?refcode=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190719_1_1&amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Pitch+in+27+or+whatever+you+can+afford+t&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190719_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190719_1_1")

Despite a years-long propaganda campaign in the corporate media, our movement's ideas -- like getting big money out of politics, ensuring that health care is a human right, and debt-free college -- are wildly popular among both Democratic voters and persuadable independents.

That's why Our Revolution groups are organizing around the country to continue advancing these ideas -- from Oregon to Massachusetts and in states where Bernie's campaign is not yet on the ground -- and working to elect progressive candidates up and down the ballot.

We know that grassroots organizing is the only way to defeat Trump and the corporate class. With hate on the rise, our mission is more critical now than ever. That's why we need your help.

[_**Stand with our people-powered political revolution by chipping in whatever you can here:**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?refcode=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190719_1_1&amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+our+peoplepowered+political+r&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190719_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190719_1_1")

| | | | For the first time in 12 years, the House passed legislation to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour!

This is incredible news. Hardworking Americans will now earn a fair wage to help them cover the cost of rent, food, and other important bills.

[**Join me and support raising the minimum wage by adding your name here →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8392509/81079067/1558708570?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmE3YzYyZC01Y2FhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSyB6gKb5cdheAjT0f-0oNSRpoJWyPYWadl4FvBOi4Q=&emci=4873c408-42aa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=cba7c62d-5caa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=2478574&contactdata=lrVyicjzpwsG3mpOvFC9OTbiXdtma6j4%2Fygn7g7UKuFzsZ6xRG6i0YQnwC7p9IUQQBq0PoxSbpWz28S9P2Ngp2q4FAWAIqYQM2q9O97XXgJTYH5mdDy%2FEM35ioYAVneq)

This legislation will help put money in the pockets of 120,000 workers in our district alone, helping them cover the costs of day-to-day living.

This raise will be good for workers, businesses, and our economy. I’m proud to have been part of this effort to give nearly 40 million Americans a raise, but I need to know I have your support.

[**It’s time to raise the federal minimum wage. Stand with me and sign on right now to support the raise →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8392511/81079069/1558708570?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmE3YzYyZC01Y2FhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSyB6gKb5cdheAjT0f-0oNSRpoJWyPYWadl4FvBOi4Q=&emci=4873c408-42aa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=cba7c62d-5caa-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=2478574&contactdata=lrVyicjzpwsG3mpOvFC9OTbiXdtma6j4%2Fygn7g7UKuFzsZ6xRG6i0YQnwC7p9IUQQBq0PoxSbpWz28S9P2Ngp2q4FAWAIqYQM2q9O97XXgJTYH5mdDy%2FEM35ioYAVneq)

Dan

clean_body: | = | | | | For the first time in 12 years, the House passed legislation to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour! This is incredible news. Hardworking Americans will now earn a fair wage to help them cover the cost of rent, food, and other important bills. This legislation will help put money in the pockets of 120,000 workers in our district alone, helping them cover the costs of day-to-day living. This raise will be good for workers, businesses, and our economy. I’m proud to have been part of this effort to give nearly 40 million Americans a raise, but I need to know I have your support. Thank you, Dan | | Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to= or =. If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can | PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS Dan Lipinski for Congress P.O. Box 520 Western Springs, IL 60558 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Homeland Security Chief Challenges Democrats to Help Improve Conditions at Border
body:
Following a surge of illegal immigration at the southern border in the first half of 2019, U.S. immigration officials asked Congress to help... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7cb8ee8df8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Homeland Security Chief Challenges Democrats to Help Improve Conditions at Border**

Following a surge of illegal immigration at the southern border in the first half of 2019, U.S. immigration officials asked Congress to help address the problem—both by closing loopholes in our system and by better funding Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

“Acting Homeland Security Secretary Kevin McAleenan told Congress on Thursday that the answer to troubling stories of overcrowding of illegal immigrants at the border is to increase money for ICE detention in the interior, putting the burden back on the Democrats most vocal in complaining about the conditions,” Stephen Dinan reports for _The Washington Times_.

“We requested thousands more beds than we got,” Acting Secretary McAleenan said. “That’s why we’re experiencing that backup at the border.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7af02a2aa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The real reason Democrats aren’t impeaching Mr. Trump is because they don’t think they can win the political argument that he committed impeachable offenses. They bet everything on Mr. Mueller’s Russia collusion probe, and he and they came up empty,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99306f12e1&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Everything else they’re doing is for show.”
---
|
---
| “On July 20, 1969, Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin became the first men to land and walk on the Moon. Through most of human history, such a feat represented the unattainable. Yet attain it we did,” space policy expert Edward Hudgins writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1899723cf6&e=3ee4985eea). “Going to the Moon was also an affirmation of the values of freedom and liberty. The political goal of Apollo was to demonstrate to the world that an open, democratic society could achieve more than our closed, totalitarian Soviet rival.”
---
|
---
| “As America prepares to celebrate the 50th anniversary of the Apollo moon landing, The New York Times is busy celebrating the Soviet space program and bashing America’s,” Karol Markowicz writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5235dfba2&e=3ee4985eea). “A Times op-ed Thursday highlighted how the Soviet Union was oh-so-diverse, sending women and people of color into space long before stuffy, old America got around to doing the same.” Of course, the Soviets promoted women and minorities to prop up their international image while torturing and executing dissidents and starving their own people. “It’s a tedious habit of modern-day liberals to examine and judge and lament all American history.”
---
|
---
| Dutch Prime Minister Mark Rutte gave President Trump the perfect D-Day commemorative at the White House yesterday, William Davis writes in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=286e9027b0&e=3ee4985eea). “Rutte presented Trump with an American flag that was on the first U.S. ship to land in Normandy as part of the D-Day invasion that occurred on June 6, 1944 during World War II. The bullet-riddled flag was purchased at an auction three years ago by Dutch collector Bert Kreuk, who later felt compelled to return the flag to the U.S.”

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d4b447b6f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1274e24f47&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=43fd0b7ed9)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: [ANNOUNCEMENT] via Beto for America
subject: Clock is running out on this one:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
It’s your last chance. We’re selecting a winner (and a friend) to meet Beto in Detroit for the Democratic debate. You’ll get: 2 plane tickets, 2 nights at a hotel, and 2 tickets to the debate.
#
We just learned that Beto will be on stage with Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, and others on July 30 for the next Democratic debate. We’re selecting a winner (and a friend) to join us.
Enter now and you’ll get: 2 plane tickets, 2 nights at a hotel, and 2 tickets to the debate. Just donate any amount on this email and your name is in the running, but act fast because we’ll be closing the raffle soon.
**⬇ All you have to do to enter is donate ANY amount to Beto right now. ⬇**
[Donate any amount now to win a trip for two to meet Beto and attend the Democratic presidential debate in Detroit.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18258?refcode=ema20190719-43439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=43439%2E444211%2EzoHsrR) **[Enter to win>> ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18258?refcode=ema20190719-43439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=43439%2E444211%2EzoHsrR)**
---
This contest closes soon, so it’s important to send your donation today before the clock runs out. Our whole team is pumped for Beto’s big debate, and we can’t wait to surprise one of you with this prize.
\- Team Beto
* * *
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter to win. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. on July 23, 2019. You may enter by making a donation [here](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18108?refcode=ema20190719-43439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=43439%2E444211%2EzoHsrR). Alternatively, you can [enter](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/debate-raffle-detroit/?source=ema20190710&t=22&akid=43439%2E444211%2EzoHsrR) without making a donation.
One winner will receive the following prize package: two round-trip airline tickets to Detroit, Michigan, at a total value, including taxes, of no more than $1,300; two nights in a Detroit hotel, at a total value, including taxes, of no more than $500; two tickets to the Democratic Debate on July 30 or 31; in-town transportation costs up to $200, to be reimbursed by Sponsor, provided receipts are submitted to info@betoorourke.com by August 31, 2019.
Total prize value not to exceed $2,000. Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. Promotion open to all U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States and District of Columbia and 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18109?t=23&akid=43439%2E444211%2EzoHsrR) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: BETO FOR AMERICA, PO BOX 3628, EL PASO, TX 79923.

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=43439%2E444211%2EzoHsrR). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Booker HQ
subject: Where will you be watching?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Did you hear the news? Cory will be on the debate stage once again on Wednesday, July 31st. We're organizing debate watch parties all across the country so Cory's supporters can cheer him on during the debate. There were over a hundred watch parties for the first debate -- and we're hoping to have even more this time. It's no secret that this is a crowded race. That's why we need to make sure we have Cory's back on debate night. [_**Can we count on you to host a debate watch party for Cory in Cresco?**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a4/1602134690/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/corys-crew-launchpad") After all, debates are best enjoyed with some snacks, good company, and a candidate you believe in. Watch parties are a fun way to meet other Cory supporters in your own community and get more involved in our grassroots movement. Visit our Cory's Crew Launchpad to get all the resources you need to set up your watch party and make it a success. [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a4/1602134690/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/corys-crew-launchpad") If you're not able to host a debate watch party this time, that's okay! You can attend a watch party in your area. [_**Sign up here to get notified about debate watch parties near you.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a3/1602134690/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-up-to-get-notifications-about-events-in-your-area?source=em_20190719") We're looking forward to seeing Cory on the big stage on Wednesday, July 31st. Booker HQ P.S. If you have any questions about hosting a watch party, we're here to help! [_**Schedule a time here to speak with one of our team members.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a2/1602134690/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-schedule-a-conversation-with-an-organizer?source=em_20190719")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a1/1602134690/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a0/1602134690/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805af/1602134690/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805ae/1602134690/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805ad/1602134690/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc085b/5fca0d19/a27e916/291805a1/1602134690/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: alert@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Star Tribune: Trump is staffing up in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Republicans will do whatever it takes to keep the Senate as a rubber stamp for Trump.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190719_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, this is urgent: The _Star Tribune_ just released concerning new details about Donald Trump's investment in Minnesota to turn it red next year.
* The RNC and state party have already put campaign staff on the ground -- including an NRA operative and field directors across Minnesota.
* More than 600 people attended 26 training events that Trump Victory Committee held across Minnesota in June.
* Winning Minnesota is a "personal priority" for Trump, the _Star Tribune_ reports, and a Trump Victory Committee official said, "We will absolutely spend one more dollar than is necessary to win."

**Republicans will do whatever it takes to keep the Senate as a rubber stamp for Trump. If we don 't organize NOW, we'll lose our shot at winning this race.**

**[Can you pitch in right now to make sure we have the resources to stop the GOP from turning this seat red? Make a contribution of $10 here.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190719_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e44b/c1f7015/65adf71e/1146bf84/2660749421/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLWp1bHkyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJydHdfMjAxOTA3MTlfZW0tZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190719_em-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Dan Baer
subject: I'm personally asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
We cannot allow spineless Republicans like Gardner to continue to enable and encourage Trump's vile behavior.
|
---

| | I'm appalled.

**[And I 'm asking for $15 before midnight to oust Trump enablers like Cory Gardner and flip the entire Senate for Democrats. >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82654/232dfd1/9aa5473/62a11278/3419313167/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=201907019_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=15&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

I watched with disgust as Trump spewed racist attacks on 4 Congresswomen of color.

I watched in horror as he doubled down on it.

I even watched him stand idly by as a stadium full of his supporters shouted racist chants.

**All the while, Cory Gardner ducked, dodged, and refused to condemn Trump 's tweets and actions.**

We cannot allow spineless Republicans like Gardner to continue to enable and encourage Trump's vile behavior.

This stops now.

We need to unseat him. We need to flip the entire Senate. And we need to make sure Trump's Republicans never have the power to push their dangerous, racist agenda ever again.

I'm personally asking you to rush in $15 before midnight to take a stand:
| | [**Donate $15 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82654/232dfd1/9aa5473/62a11278/3419313167/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=201907019_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=15&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Thanks,

Dan

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. name: Bill de Blasio
subject: This win feels familiar...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
The House just passed a $15 minimum wage bill. But we still need a president who gets things done.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21276/1630b3eb/513b6b9b/5f5564b2/2177771616/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=684_org_em_fr")
Friend --
It's been a historic week: just yesterday, the House passed a $15 minimum wage bill -- and it's about time Washington started putting working people first.
I'm proud that New York City was one of the first cities to take action on a $15 minimum wage. But now we need a president in Washington who knows how to turn yesterday's victory into a real win for working people nationwide.
**[Contribute $1 right now to help us keep growing momentum for working people.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21276/1630b3eb/513b6b9b/5f5564b2/2177771616/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=684_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21276/1630b3eb/513b6b9b/5f5564b2/2177771616/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=684_org_em_fr")
We can't accomplish progressive goals without a president who gets progressive things done -- **and I 'm the only candidate in this race with that kind of track record.** And we're building the momentum to win: we've raised more money in less time than anyone expected.
We began this campaign with a late start, but we're gaining momentum because working people want change. And it won't be long before Republicans and corporate Democrats take notice and begin organizing to block our progress. Let's make sure we have the resources to keep growing.
Thank you for lending a hand,
Bill

[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21276/1630b3eb/513b6b9b/5f5564b2/2177771616/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=684_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21276/1630b3eb/513b6b9b/5f5564b4/2177771616/VEsHBQ/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21276/1630b3eb/513b6b9b/5f5564bb/2177771616/VEsHBA/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

| | Wow -- I just got the news. As of 2pm: \- A breaking NBC poll shows me qualifying for the next debates \- I'm now halfway to meeting the polling criteria to qualify **\- I only need 2 more polls to officially secure my spot on that stage!** I am truly humbled. Your support is deciding this entire race -- and our rise in the polls proves it. [_**I 'm asking for your $15 in this critical moment to continue to spread my message, run that one extra ad, reach that one extra voter, and hold that one extra town hall, so I can continue to surge in the polls and officially qualify for the next debates. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce02/3eb3e2fc/5915b33c/744a4390/2377730108/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190719_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") When I stood on that first debate stage, I spoke from the heart. I fought for your family like you were my own. I fought for lives lost to police violence like mine was in danger. I fought for kids caged at the border like they were my daughter and son. **I will never --_never_ \-- stop fighting for you. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce02/3eb3e2fc/5915b33c/744a4387/2377730108/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce02/3eb3e2fc/5915b33c/744a4386/2377730108/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Sign On via Healthcare Action
subject: will you lose your healthcare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | It's scary, the Affordable Care Act is under attack like never before. This is a national healthcare emergency, and we need you to raise your voice. [See below, and please sign on right away.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://debbiewassermanschultz.com/landing/aca/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+See+below+and+please+sign+on+right+away&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2&source=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2")

\--- Original Message ---
> Friend,
>
> Last week, Debbie and her colleagues on the House Oversight Committee held a hearing to look into the Trump Administration's plan to overturn the entire Affordable Care Act.
>
> Let us tell you, what they discovered was alarming.
>
> Republicans are strategically working their way through the court system in the hopes of getting rid of the ACA for good. The House has passed bills to strengthen the ACA, and now, Mitch McConnell and the Republican-led Senate must do the same and take swift action to protect the Affordable Care Act. [Sign on now to join 10,000 strong raising their voices to protect affordable healthcare.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://debbiewassermanschultz.com/landing/aca/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Sign+on+now+to+join+10000+strong+raising&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2&source=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2")
>
> [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://debbiewassermanschultz.com/landing/aca/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2&source=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2")
> In Debbie's district alone, 72,000 people would lose their healthcare coverage if the ACA is overturned. That's just ONE congressional district.
>
> Friend, the numbers are truly shocking. Millions across the country will face a healthcare crisis if Trump and McConnell get their way. [Join us in standing up for the Affordable Care Act - Tell Mitch McConnell and the Senate to protect the healthcare of millions of Americans as the House has done.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://debbiewassermanschultz.com/landing/aca/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+Join+us+in+standing+up+for+the+Affordabl&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2&source=DWS_EM_PT_90DO_190719_1_2")
>
> Thanks,
>
> Team DWS
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
>

subject: Remember This?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
What Democrats used to say about border security. | |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=75f24138b9&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
Hillary Clinton is in Georgia today. Believe it or not, even Hillary voted for and said she supported “a barrier to try to prevent illegal border crossings.” Wonder if she'll admit that while she's here?

[**Or if she'll acknowledge what Bill Clinton said about illegal immigration when he was President:**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=dcf09cfcb0&e=02cd889ad3)[****](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=92786b8db3&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8d20c8ec31&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| In the past, even Democrats did not deny what we all know to be true \-- there is a crisis at our Southern Border. **Today, however, the Democrat Party is the party of open borders. **

Now, the Democrats running for President want to decriminalize illegal border crossings. They want to give free health care to those here illegally. They want illegal aliens to vote. And they will do whatever it takes to obstruct President Trump’s push to finally deal with the crisis at our Southern Border.

**David is working to call out Democrat hypocrisy, but he needs supporters like you to step up.**

[**Will you add your name if you think it’s time to secure the border? **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=eddc2c490b&e=02cd889ad3)

It’s time for radical Democrats to stop putting political self-interest before our country’s national interest. Period.

Thanks for all you do!

Team Perdue
---
| [SECURE THE BORDER >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e23c6fed22&e=02cd889ad3 "SECURE THE BORDER >>>")
---

name: James Mackler
subject: My new opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
There's a new opponent in my race, but he hasn't even officially announced his candidacy.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa260/18d6a294/4b8c47ad/26d674f6/3184657382/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | I have an important update: There's a new opponent in my race, but he hasn't even officially announced his candidacy. Donald Trump did. Instead of announcing his campaign to Tennesseans, he went to Trump first. I've always been driven by a sense of duty to my country.
It's what made me close my law practice after 9/11 at 30 years old and volunteer to serve in the Army.
And it's what driving my campaign for the Senate now.
We need a leader who's focused on serving Tennesseans -- not Trump, Washington Republicans, or special-interest groups.
[**_Chip in today, so I can fight for Tennesseans in the Senate._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa260/18d6a294/4b8c47ad/26d674f7/3184657382/VEsB/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190718?refcode=jme190718_m&recurring=true")
Thank you,
James

name: Peter Cunningham, Team Hickenlooper
subject: It's official:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Congress has a responsibility to get the facts. We also need to focus on the serious and ongoing threat to our election security and national security from Russia's interference in our elections, whic | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377175e/691c9bd/6d176575/11a477de/1191301714/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend:

**It 's official: John will be participating in night 1 of the second Democratic debate--July 30, 2019.**

That night, he'll be taking on candidates who've been in the national spotlight far longer than he has and who have a lot more skill at talking up wealthy donors. But the fact is, none of these big-name candidates have the experience or track record John has.

**For the American people to fully understand what John alone can offer in this race, he needs to be on _every_ debate stage.**

I'll be honest with you--the stakes are high. We need 130,000 individuals to chip in to this campaign in order for John to qualify for the September debates.

**John 's message will not continue to reach the American people unless he qualifies for the fall debates.** [**_Can you chip in even $1 today to help him get there?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190719_PC_20190719-fr-PC-debatedate-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Addisu Demissie, Cory 2020
subject: How small-dollar donations help us grow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I know we send a lot of emails asking for donations, but I want you to see how small donations are building this campaign from the ground up. In a competitive race with so many candidates, we need a lot of resources to bring this thing across the finish line. All along, our focus has been on creating a campaign that can go the distance. But, in order to be successful, we need to raise money to help us reach our goals. Raising money is a reality of running a campaign these days. **And trust me it 's not our favorite thing to do -- but it's vital to our long-term success.** Our first priority will always be to stay true to our values. It's why when Cory entered this race, he said that he wasn't going to take any donations from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs -- and we've kept that promise. **Our average online donation in the last quarter was only $15.11.** It's because of thousands of supporters making small-dollar donations that we have powered this campaign. These donations help us open up field offices and hire staff. We just opened two new offices in New Hampshire and South Carolina. In the past few weeks, we've also hired 19 additional organizing staffers in South Carolina and Nevada. These are the important investments that will help us succeed in critical early voting states. Donations also cover the cost of supplies -- like clipboards and flyers -- so our organizers have what they need to effectively reach out to voters in the field. Another way your donation helps is by allowing us to purchase ads on social media so we can spread Cory's message online. These are some of the critical things we need to run a successful campaign. There are still a few more things on my to-do list, however. I want to hire even more organizers and invest in even more tools -- such as advertising -- that amplify Cory's message. And we need to make these important investments right now so we can remain competitive in the months ahead. **If you want to see Cory in this race for the long haul,** **[**please help us grow our campaign by making your first donation today.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190719-em?refcode=em_fr_20190719_AD_20190719-fr-AD-whereitgoes-actives_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'm so proud of how much this team has grown since we launched this campaign. We've come a long way. With your continued support, there's no stopping us. Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190719-em?refcode=em_fr_20190719_AD_20190719-fr-AD-whereitgoes-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") ** ** ** **
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0845/5fca0d19/a59f46e/2918022b/2657650474/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0845/5fca0d19/a59f46e/2918022a/2657650474/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0845/5fca0d19/a59f46e/29180229/2657650474/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0845/5fca0d19/a59f46e/29180228/2657650474/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0845/5fca0d19/a59f46e/29180237/2657650474/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0845/5fca0d19/a59f46e/2918022b/2657650474/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Putting People First
body:
This Saturday, Governor Eric Holcomb made it official – he’s running for another four years to lead our state as governor. Standing at center court...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/putting-people-first?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Putting People First

This Saturday, Governor Eric Holcomb made it official – he’s running for another four years to lead our state as governor. Standing at center court at the historic Hoosier Gym in Knightstown, surrounded by a “packed house” (https://www.thecouriertimes.com/common/story.php?ID=11405&mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) of cheering Hoosiers, he laid out his vision not just for the future of Indiana, but for what kind of campaign you’ll see in the weeks and months ahead.

I’m so honored to share with you that Governor Holcomb has picked me to lead the team (https://holcombforindiana.com/governor-holcomb-names-campaign-manager/?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) as his campaign manager. I’ll continue to serve as our state party chairman as well, so rest assured – Hoosier Republicans today are one team, unified and ready to keep Indiana moving forward.

And, of course, when breaking the news about my new role this week, Governor Holcomb made another sports reference:

“I’m grateful Kyle Hupfer is committed to leading our total team effort. He’s no stranger to doing double duty and wearing multiple hats, which will serve him and our campaign well as the months ahead unfold. As Governor, this is like getting your number one draft pick. I couldn’t be more pleased and proud.”

And I’ll tell you right now, it’s going to be a different kind of campaign than what you’re used to here in Indiana. It’s going to center on real people telling their real stories about the positive impact Governor Holcomb has had on them, their families and their communities. Like Governor Holcomb, this campaign is going to be Putting People First.

And after Saturday’s big event, we are full steam ahead! Check out photos below in this email to see more about Governor Holcomb’s stops across the state (so many more to come!). And if you’re ready to join the Holcomb Crew, click here to get involved (https://holcombforindiana.com/get-involved/?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Governor Holcomb visits the Clark County Fair with his new campaign manager, Kyle Hupfer, and with his campaign chairman, Clark County Sheriff Jamey Noel.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Four More Years:
Governor Holcomb Running for Re-Election

“Let’s keep hanging the banners. And let’s keep making Hoosier history for four more years! Are you with me?!”

The Hoosier Gym in Knightstown was electric on Saturday afternoon. And no, it’s wasn’t overtime at a high school basketball game – it was Governor Holcomb announcing that he’s running to continue serving as our governor for another four year, and to continue Putting People First!

And, of course, where else would Governor Holcomb break the news than at the home court of the Hickory Huskers from the iconic movie “Hoosiers?” Governor Holcomb stood at the podium and quoted Coach Dale: “My team’s on the floor!”

Check out these photos from Saturday, and click here to see more (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/posts/1514881585312894?__xts__[0]=68.ARDzwv84sGnluSmwUtvzDjOc_9R7Iu_nkAmyErtDYCKDSJ7WF6QFQrpl8OP2vbmgGtulFZc2Js7lKZ2My7pV_pHP5cPqk6pLnB3apEU-RH_wp2Xd5F--__WkqzxJPdRK9h08b69KW80Juv3R8ojUYfvKQ9Te8lS7bSkz9bsi1ltYsa1YLg-LaQfi5rTFU3XszaXUmPyV6LqKCnKgQUSH7xelyBQw6gaRA1_bGktPdYpxxcmfIQGJcM3DhdGWc8HSAPK2YFFCT0Z4oWMrW6QSjadwvGZ2wF-W6x3lXyK5ryQOymCT3nnDVICWwZBrKST-vMk9newIPrGv_IlK7AGhj7Pv5A&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Governor Holcomb in “Perpetual Motion”

Governor Holcomb isn’t slowing down! As he’d say, he’s in “perpetual motion.” After his big announcement on Saturday, he hit the road this week, meeting with Hoosiers and talking with local reporters in Noblesville, Greenfield, Shelbyville, Franklin, Charlestown, Leavenworth, Evansville and Terre Haute!

Check out these photos from Governor Holcomb’s travels on the road, and see even more on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

National Democrats Descend on Indiana

Nancy Pelosi and a parade of Democrats running for president are descending on Indiana this week and next for a series of events in downtown Indianapolis. Among the who’s who of out-of-touch liberal politicians touching down in Trump Country are Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Cory Booker and, would you believe it, Pete Buttigieg.

That’s right! The absentee mayor of South Bend actually took time to set foot in his home state yesterday. It’s unclear whether or not he was able to squeeze in a trip up US 31 to check-in on South Bend – but considering how people there feel about him right now he’s probably wise to stick to his New Hampshire/Iowa/California/New York itinerary.

We just hope they all take a moment to break away from their bubbles and talk to real Hoosiers while they are here. Because if they do, they’ll learn that Republican policies lead to balanced budgets, vibrant communities, more people in good-paying jobs and lower taxes. You might call the Indiana Way a blueprint for success. Let’s hope they take some notes – and call us if they have any follow up questions.

Upcoming Republican Events

July 30 (http://indiana.gop/events/take-me-out-ballgame?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Take Me Out to the Ballgame with Downtown GOP Club, GIRWC, Broad Ripple GOP Club
August 14 (http://indiana.gop/events/fulton-county-republican-party-golf-outing?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Fulton County Republican Party Golf Outing
August 23 (http://indiana.gop/events/2019-hendricks-county-golf-outing?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Hendricks County Republican Party Golf Outing
September 5 (http://indiana.gop/events/pike-gop-ice-cream-social-0?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Pike GOP Ice Cream Social
September 20 (http://indiana.gop/events/adams-county-golf-outing?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Adams County Golf Outing
September 21 (http://indiana.gop/events/brown-county-gop-bbq?mc_cid=58fb5f03f6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Brown County GOP BBQ
