name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: unforgettable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48e2/886171576/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---
| | **Team Juli an is fired up after an unforgettable trip to Iowa!** Julian's first stop was at the **Progress Iowa Corn Feed in Cedar Rapids**. He was greeted with great enthusiasm as he spoke about key policies like his People First Immigration plan. The crowd especially resonated with his family's experience with immigration. | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48e1/886171576/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---

Unifying stories of immigration continued to be shared with Julian at an **Immigration Town Hall** attended by around 200 people. The town hall was hosted in **Mount Pleasant** , a community that was largely affected by ICE raids last year. Many people shared their own stories of resilience and how they have come together to stand up for one another.
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48e0/886171576/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---

**On Monday in rural Keokuk, Iowa**, Secretary Castro held a meet-and-greet at the Keokuk Labor Temple, where more than a hundred residents asked questions about health care, immigration, trade, and education, in a town of less than 10,000.
"Castro's probably my favorite candidate among the men in the race," said Sandy Bertucci. "It made me feel good," said [Amy Johnson, a second grade teacher in Keokuk](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48ef/886171576/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://julianforthefuture.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ffb6aa6261660d236ebc19ba&id=cdd4a5160b&e=50cdc07fb9&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+Amy+Johnson+a+second+grade+teacher+in+Ke&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all"). "It made me feel like we are, as a nation, wanting to come together as a nation to figure stuff out. Because somethings got to be done."
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48ee/886171576/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---

Julian then joined **Muscatine Mayor Diana Broderson, Councilman Kelcey Brackett and LULAC Iowa President Nick Salazar** in a walking tour of Muscatine's local businesses.
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48ed/886171576/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---

**Tuesday was a busy day! **
In the morning, Julian joined **Fight for 15 Iowa** in a march for $15 minimum wage and union rights outside the AARP forum.
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48ec/886171576/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---

Then, Julian joined the **AARP forum** to share how he would address age discrimination, healthcare, housing and Social Security.
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48eb/886171576/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---

Our trip to Iowa finished with a great event hosted by **LULAC Council 10 - the largest chapter in the United States**.

[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48ea/886171576/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---
_A special thank you to LULAC Council 10 President Jazmin Newton for hosting and organizing!_

\--

**Thank you Iowa -- we'll keep y'all posted on our visits throughout the country!**
#TeamJulian

[**DONATE**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48e9/886171576/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48e8/886171576/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48d7/886171576/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48d6/886171576/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48d5/886171576/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48d4/886171576/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce04/3eb3e2fc/59367657/744a48d3/886171576/VEsHAw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=20190719_em_ia_update_all&source=20190719_em_ia_update_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: Team Kamala
subject: History in the making
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
This is it. Your last chance to win two tickets to the Democratic presidential primary debate on July 31 is at midnight tonight. Airfare and hotel are covered — all you need to do is make a contribution to Kamala’s campaign right now to be automatically entered. What are you waiting for? **Make a contribution of any amount and we will automatically enter you into the contest.
